overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through a rainy neon-lit urban environment at night, ascending an external staircase, and entering a cyberpunk-style apartment with vibrant neon lighting and modern decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with large illuminated billboard

agents.ego_description: walking away from billboard down wet city street with neon reflections

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 35.1 V6 and congratulations message
rain-soaked street with yellow stripes and puddle reflections
dark industrial buildings lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a large illuminated billboard on the right side of a wet urban street at night. The camera moves forward along the rain-soaked asphalt, passing yellow road markings with neon lights reflecting in puddles. The environment is devoid of pedestrians or vehicles, creating a moody, atmospheric cyberpunk street scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection approaching industrial building

events.description: approaching building with external metal staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through wet streets toward building entrance with external stairs

entered.detail: rusty metal fire escape staircase attached to building exterior
bright neon signs and skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open urban area, the camera approaches an industrial building with a prominent external metal staircase. The distant city skyline glows with neon signs while the wet pavement continues to reflect the ambient light. The billboard from the previous segment falls behind as the focus shifts to the building entrance ahead.

events.description: beginning ascent of external metal staircase
reaching top of staircase, approaching entrance door

agents.ego_description: climbing metal staircase to upper floor entrance

entered.detail: rusty metal stairs with railings and grated steps
metal security door at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the external metal staircase, moving from the open street into a more enclosed vertical space. The stairs are weathered and industrial, with steam vents visible in the background. The lighting shifts to a greenish artificial hue as the camera climbs toward the upper level door.

agents.ego_description: walking through corridor and taking elevator to apartment level

entered.detail: narrow hallway with green fluorescent lighting and concrete walls
metal elevator car with green illuminated control panel

segments.scene_description: Entering the building through the metal door, the scene transitions to a dimly lit indoor corridor with green fluorescent lighting. The camera proceeds to an elevator, rides it upward, and exits into the apartment space. The environment shifts from industrial exterior to a more refined interior setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment with bar and aquarium

events.description: entering main apartment living space with neon lighting
entering bedroom area with red carpet

agents.ego_description: exploring the apartment interior, examining the bar counter, aquarium, and bedroom

entered.detail: bar with yellow neon trim, stools, and vending machines
tall illuminated fish tank with aquatic plants and rocks
sleeping area with bed, red carpet, and window showing city lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a stylish cyberpunk apartment with vibrant purple and yellow neon lighting. The space features a central bar counter with yellow neon trim, a large illuminated aquarium, and modern decor. The camera explores the living area before moving into a bedroom with red carpet and a view of the city lights through a window, showcasing the contrast between the gritty exterior and the comfortable interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban street into the refined interior of a cyberpunk apartment. It begins by gliding along wet asphalt beneath a large illuminated billboard, where neon lights reflect in puddles across a deserted city road. As the camera moves forward, the open street gives way to an industrial building, shifting focus from the glowing distant skyline toward a weathered external metal staircase. The perspective then ascends these stairs through a haze of steam and greenish artificial light before passing through a metal door into a dimly lit corridor. Finally, the camera rides an elevator upward, transitioning from the industrial exterior into a modern, neon-lit living space.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stylish cyberpunk apartment that transitions from a vibrant social hub to a private sanctuary. It begins by exploring a living area bathed in purple and yellow neon lighting, centering on a bar counter with glowing yellow trim and a large illuminated aquarium. As the camera glides through the modern decor, the space shifts from the open communal area toward the more intimate quarters of the home. The scene finally opens into a bedroom featuring red carpeting, where the interior comfort contrasts with the distant city lights visible through the window.
